context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the create-prd instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Draft** — fill **[PRD_TEMPLATE.md](./PRD_TEMPLATE.md)** section by section (canonical order and Rails-oriented fields). Do not invent a parallel outline.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Functional Requirements** are written in natural language ("the system must send a confirmation email when…"), not Ruby.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Next Steps** closes the PRD with the suggested follow-on (typically: "Run `generate-tasks` against this PRD once approved.").
